hero.titulo: A space to learn, create and grow
hero.subtitulo: Artistic activities for the community. Singing, Instruments, Ensemble, Social Skills, Object Theater and more.

descripcion: EL Taller “Espacio de Arte” opened its doors in 2005 under the name 'Quica Susmaes' Integral Singing School and with the motto: 'He who sings, scares away his woes.'
From its beginnings, it promoted and taught singing and musical instrument classes with the mission of fostering encounters of common affinity and shared learning.
People of all ages and levels have passed through our house, many of them taking their first professional steps.
We believe that music is a faithful companion and that, like all art, it exerts a transforming function in every being.

That is why, a few years ago, we decided to spread our wings and open space to new artistic disciplines that can also awaken, accompany, and transform those who are available and permeable to that experience.
We changed our name and location because we chose to trust our intuition and evolve along with our essence.
We invite everyone who resonates with our mission to Learn, Create, and Grow through art, to join and become part of the EL Taller. Espacio de Arte family.
sobreNosotros.mision: Learn, Create and Grow through art

valores.descripcion: We prioritize each person's individual process from the beginning, accompanying their unique evolution.
We open our doors to everyone, regardless of age or experience.
We encourage personal expression and creative thinking.
We build bonds between students, teachers and families.

clases.subtitulo: Find the best proposal for you
clases.descripcion: We offer individual and group classes for all ages and levels. For more information or to enroll, contact us via WhatsApp.

habilidades-sociales.descripcion: Therapeutic and educational space for teens. Improves communication, emotional management, and conflict resolution. Thursdays 4 PM to 5.30 PM.

canto.descripcion: Destined for the awakening of what still sleeps and the improvement of what already exists. For teens and adults. Individual or duos.

ensamble-vocal.descripcion: Female vocational group focused on building vocal harmonies and shared artistic growth. Tuesdays 7.30 PM to 9 PM.

ensamble-jovenes.descripcion: Group where you learn to sing in two or more voices, growing and creating different vocal harmonies together. Thursdays 7 PM to 8.30 PM.

teatro-objetos.descripcion: Parting from puppet theater tools, designed for adults interested in pouring their creativity into this art. Mondays 7.30 PM to 9 PM.

instrumento.descripcion: Musical instruments introduce us to the world of music and can accompany us for a lifetime. Beginner and intermediate levels. Private and group classes.

docentes.descripcion: Our teachers are professional musicians with a vocation for teaching. Each brings their own experience and style to enrich the learning experience.

actividades.descripcion: At El Taller, music doesn't end in the classroom. We organize two types of events where students and guests share the stage and the song.

presentacion-canto.descripcion: The big event of the year. Every December, students take the stage to show everything they've learned throughout the year. A night of music, emotion and community.

karaoketon.descripcion: Quarterly, intimate and interactive gatherings. It's not just students who sing: guests who want to join in also get their moment at the microphone! A shared celebration with karaoke, improvisation and lots of fun.

contacto.descripcion: Message us on WhatsApp or by email and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.

footer.descripcion: El Taller — Art Space. Music for all ages.
